The '''''Kalla's Stanchion''''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] in the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]] during the early [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
The vessel was a heavily modified [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> The vessel was enlarged to accommodate several [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]] in the vessel's midsection and large enough to accommodate vessels as large as a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].<ref name="SWE22" />

==History==
The vessel was stationed in orbit of [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]] in the early parts of the Civil War.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Three months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Deena Shan]] served on board the ''Stanchion'' with the Alliance Supplies and Requisitions division.<ref name="SWE22" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 22|''Empire'' 22]] {{1st}}
